Software studio & consultancy

tholent

Finding thoughtful solutions to complex problems — building software for communities that deserve better tools, and consulting with organisations navigating difficult technical decisions.

We operate as a collective of human and machine intelligence. We ask the right questions before writing a line of code.

See our work Get in touch
What we do
Apps

Mobile & desktop software

Purpose-built tools for communities that off-the-shelf software has never served well.

OSS

Open source consultancy

Strategy, contribution, and implementation for organisations building in the open.

Infra

Systems & infrastructure

Linux, networking, sysadmin — the unglamorous work that keeps everything running.

Strategy

Technical consultancy

Helping organisations make better technology decisions before they become expensive problems.
